brief: Audit a dental clinic homepage for accessibility risks, landmark structure gaps, CTA clarity, content hierarchy problems, and proof placement issues. Assign severity for each finding and include evidence and actionable recommendations.

requiredSignals.description: Audit output is typed as a page audit.
Summary of overall audit result is present.
At least one finding is recorded.
Every finding carries a severity rating.
Every finding includes observed evidence for the issue.
Every finding includes an actionable recommendation.
All severity values use approved vocabulary tokens.
No severity tokens invented outside the approved vocabulary.
